title: LoopOS Readiness Proof
description: Proof-carrying readiness record for LoopOS releases. Phase 0 emits the schema and an example; runtime producer arrives in Phase 1.

fsm_coverage.description: True when every FSM state and transition is covered by at least one test.

policy_gates_active.description: True when all Policy OS gates are active and exercised.

budget_enforced.description: True when FreedomBudget (token / step / wall-time) is enforced.

memory_governed.description: True when every STORE_MEMORY op goes through Memory Governance.

replay_deterministic.description: True when the same input replays to the same normalized state hash.

go_core_untouched.description: True when v0.1.0 loopos/ baseline files are unchanged.

aci_runtime_bound.description: True when ACI commands route through Policy OS and Syscall Router.

ali_fsm_bound.description: True when ALI sessions are driven by the loop-level FSM.

anti_bloat_checked.description: True when anti_bloat_check.py ran and no hard-fail was emitted.

evidence.description: Optional evidence references; structure defined in Phase 1.
